metadata.title: About us
metadata.description: Real2Own connects real estate, land, new developments and professional partners across German and international markets.

hero.title: Real estate connects people, places and opportunities.
hero.description: Real2Own is a platform for properties, land, new developments and professional partners across German and international markets.
hero.note: Personal real estate services with an international perspective.

story.title: One central place for different real estate plans.
story.paragraph1: Searching for a property, land or the right project partner is often spread across many different platforms and contacts.
story.paragraph2: Real2Own brings these areas together. Buyers, tenants, owners, project developers and construction partners gain clear access to suitable listings and contacts.
story.paragraph3: The focus is not on having the largest possible number of listings, but on clear, high-quality and personal presentation.

principles.title: Clarity, quality and personal contact.
principles.description: Real estate is about more than data and square metres. Good decisions require understandable information, the right contacts and trust.

personal.title: Personal communication
personal.description: Every real estate decision is individual. That is why we focus on direct contact and clear communication.

international.title: International perspective
international.description: We connect property listings and projects with suitable prospective clients across regional and national borders.

quality.title: Quality over quantity
quality.description: Our focus is on selected listings, professional presentations and transparent information.

areas.title: Real estate and projects from different perspectives.
areas.description: Real2Own connects private property searches with land, new developments and professional project partnerships.

metadata.description: Provider identification and legal information for Real2Own.

responsible.title: Responsible for content

metadata.title: Privacy Policy | Real2Own
metadata.description: Information about the processing of personal data by Real2Own.

general.title: 1. General information
general.paragraph1: The protection of your personal data is particularly important to us. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with applicable data protection laws, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), as well as this Privacy Policy.
general.paragraph2: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. This includes, for example, your name, address, email address, telephone number, IP address and information about your use of this website.

controller.title: 2. Data controller
controller.intro: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation is:

hosting.title: 3. Hosting and website operation via Vercel
hosting.intro: This website is hosted by the following service provider:
hosting.description: Vercel processes technically necessary data in order to provide this website, deliver content to your device and ensure the security, stability and functionality of the technical infrastructure.
hosting.dataIntro: In particular, the following data may be processed:

dataItems.ip: IP address of the accessing device,
dataItems.http: HTTP method and HTTP status code,

hosting.legalBasis: The processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Our legitimate interest lies in the secure, stable and efficient provision of our online services and in detecting and preventing technical attacks.

processing.title: Data processing on our behalf
processing.paragraph1: Where Vercel processes personal data on our behalf, such processing is carried out on the basis of a data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.
processing.paragraph2: Vercel may use additional contractually bound subprocessors to provide its services. These may provide services including cloud infrastructure, network delivery, security and technical support.

international.title: International data transfers
international.paragraph1: Vercel uses a globally distributed technical infrastructure. Technical data may therefore also be processed outside Germany and outside the European Economic Area.
international.paragraph2: When using Vercel, personal data may in particular be transferred to the United States.
international.paragraph3: According to Vercel, the company is certified under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework. Where a transfer is not based on this adequacy mechanism, the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses or other appropriate safeguards may be used.

retention.title: Retention period
retention.paragraph1: Technical log and security data is processed only for as long as necessary to provide and ensure the security and stability of the website.
retention.paragraph2: The specific retention period may depend on the type of log, the Vercel plan used and the relevant technical configuration. Data may be retained for longer where this is necessary to investigate a security incident, comply with legal obligations or establish, exercise or defend legal claims.

contact.title: 4. Contact forms and communications
contact.paragraph1: When you contact us by email, telephone or through a form provided on this website, we process the information you provide in order to handle your enquiry.
contact.dataIntro: This may include, in particular, the following information:

dataItems.name: first and last name,
dataItems.property: information about a property or plot of land,
dataItems.recommendation: information relating to a property recommendation,
dataItems.valuation: information provided in connection with a valuation or brokerage enquiry,
dataItems.searchCriteria: information about desired properties or search criteria,
dataItems.exclusiveOffers: information provided in connection with an enquiry about exclusive property offers.

contact.contractBasis: Where the contact is made for the purpose of initiating or performing a contract, the legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
contact.otherBasis: For other enquiries, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Our legitimate interest lies in appropriately handling and responding to your enquiry.
contact.consentBasis: Where we expressly obtain your consent for specific processing, the processing is based on Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR.
contact.serviceProvider: Form data is processed solely for the purpose of handling the respective enquiry. Where an external technical service provider is used for this purpose, processing is carried out on the basis of the appropriate contractual and data protection arrangements.

purposes.title: 5. Purposes of data processing
purposes.intro: We process personal data in particular for the following purposes:

items.communication: communicating with prospective clients and customers,
items.mediation: facilitating contact between prospective clients, owners and project partners,

legalBases.title: 6. Legal bases
legalBases.intro: Depending on the relevant processing activity, the following legal bases may apply in particular:

items.consent: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR where you have consented to the processing,
items.contract: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR where processing is necessary for the performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures,
items.legalObligation: Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR where processing is necessary to comply with a legal obligation,
items.legitimateInterest: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR where processing is necessary for our legitimate interests or those of a third party and your interests or fundamental rights do not override those interests.

retention.title: 7. Retention period
retention.paragraph1: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the respective purpose of processing.
retention.paragraph2: Data from contact, valuation and brokerage enquiries is generally deleted once the enquiry has been fully processed and no further retention is necessary.
retention.paragraph3: Longer retention may apply in particular where statutory retention obligations exist, the data is required for the performance of a contract or legitimate interests, such as the establishment or defence of legal claims, prevent deletion.
retention.paragraph4: Where statutory retention obligations apply, the relevant data is deleted after expiry of the applicable retention period unless another legal basis for continued storage exists.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.intro: This website may use cookies and similar technologies. Cookies are small files or pieces of information that can be stored on or read from your device.

necessary.title: Technically necessary technologies
necessary.paragraph1: Technically necessary cookies and comparable technologies are used only where required to provide the website securely and functionally or to perform a function expressly requested by you.
necessary.paragraph2: In these cases, storing information on your device or accessing information already stored on it is based on § 25(2) TDDDG.
necessary.paragraph3: Where personal data is processed in this context, the legal basis is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Our legitimate interest lies in the secure and functional provision of the website.

optional.title: Non-essential technologies
optional.paragraph1: Analytics, marketing or personalisation technologies are not currently used. Should such technologies be introduced in the future, they will only be used where valid consent is required and you have provided that consent in advance.
optional.paragraph2: In such a case, the storage of or access to information is based on § 25(1) TDDDG. Any subsequent processing of personal data is based on your consent pursuant to Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR.
optional.paragraph3: Any consent granted may be withdrawn or changed at any time with effect for the future through the consent settings provided at that time.

browser.title: Browser settings
browser.paragraph1: You can configure your browser to notify you when cookies are set, allow cookies only in individual cases or reject cookies generally.
browser.paragraph2: Disabling technically necessary cookies or comparable storage technologies may restrict the functionality of the website.

recipients.title: 9. Recipients and disclosure of data
recipients.paragraph1: We do not sell personal data.
recipients.paragraph2: Personal data is disclosed only where necessary to perform a contract or respond to an enquiry, where a legal obligation exists, where there is a legitimate interest or where you have previously given your consent.
recipients.paragraph3: In connection with a specifically requested real estate brokerage service, personal data may in particular be disclosed to property owners, property providers, real estate agents, project developers, construction partners or other parties involved in the requested service. Such disclosure takes place only where necessary to process your enquiry, carry out pre-contractual measures or perform a contract, or where you have consented to the disclosure.
recipients.paragraph4: Technical service providers may have access to personal data as processors. This includes, in particular, the hosting provider Vercel.

rights.title: 10. Your data protection rights
rights.intro: Subject to the applicable legal requirements, you have in particular the following rights:

items.access: the right to access the personal data we process about you,
items.correction: the right to rectification of inaccurate data,
items.deletion: the right to erasure of your personal data,
items.restriction: the right to restriction of processing,
items.objection: the right to object to certain processing activities,
items.withdrawal: the right to withdraw consent with effect for the future,
items.complaint: the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.

rights.contact: To exercise your rights, you may contact us at the following email address:

consent.title: Withdrawal of consent
consent.description: You may withdraw any consent you have given at any time with effect for the future. The lawfulness of processing carried out on the basis of consent before its withdrawal remains unaffected.

objection.title: Objection to processing
objection.paragraph1: Where processing is based on Art. 6(1)(e) or (f) GDPR, you have the right to object at any time, on grounds relating to your particular situation, to the processing of your personal data.
objection.paragraph2: Following an objection, we will generally no longer process the personal data concerned unless we can demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds for the processing that override your interests, rights and freedoms, or the processing is required for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims.

authority.title: 12. Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
authority.paragraph1: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data.
authority.paragraph2: For private-sector companies based in Bavaria, the following supervisory authority is particularly relevant:
authority.paragraph3: You may also contact another competent data protection supervisory authority, in particular the supervisory authority at your habitual residence, your place of work or the place of the alleged infringement.

encryption.title: 13. SSL or TLS encryption
encryption.paragraph1: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, this website uses SSL or TLS encryption.
encryption.paragraph2: An encrypted connection can generally be identified by the use of "https://" in your browser's address bar.

automated.title: 14. Automated decision-making and profiling
automated.paragraph1: No solely automated decision-making within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR takes place.
automated.paragraph2: Personal data is not used for profiling that produces legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affects you.

privacyContact.title: 15. Data protection contact
privacyContact.description: For questions regarding data protection, the processing of your personal data or the exercise of your rights, please contact:

updates.title: 16. Updates to this Privacy Policy
updates.paragraph1: We may amend this Privacy Policy if legal requirements, website functions, the nature of data processing or the technical service providers used change.
updates.paragraph2: The version published on this website at the relevant time applies.

information.title: Space for new perspectives.
information.disclaimer: The information shown is provided as non-binding preliminary information. Areas, prices, availability and property features may change and will be confirmed separately before any brokerage transaction.

contact.title: Interested in this property?
contact.description: We will send you further information and arrange a personal consultation or viewing with you.

email.subject: Property enquiry {id}: {title}
email.interest: I am interested in the following property:
